title: Liam Tries Using Magic for the First Time
overview: Liam is an office worker in another world and does not know how he got there. In this new realm, he takes over the body of Liam, the fifth son of a noble family that's about to lose its status, although that doesn't concern him. In this world, magic exists, and he can learn to wield it.

title: Liam Tries Becoming an Adventurer
overview: Albrevit seems worried about the idea of Liam wanting to succeed his father, so he decides to introduce him to the Hunters' Association, where the young magic enthusiast will soon earn recognition.

title: Liam Tries Talking to a Dragon Fiend
overview: The eldest of the Hamilton brothers is beside himself over Liam's progress. He tries to accomplish great feats himself, but in the process, he makes a grave mistake.

title: Liam Tries Taking an Elf Familiar
overview: Radon asks Liam to protect some fairies from a forest, as their wings are highly coveted. As part of the process, his magic continues to evolve.

title: Liam Tries Getting Engaged to the Princess
overview: Laim and the elves continue building their village in the Promised Land, which attracts the attention of monsters and humans alike.

title: Liam Tries Making Incredible Armor
overview: Liam continues to build his nation's strength by recruiting a group of trolls and learning to recreate Radon's magic battle armor.

title: Liam Tries Fighting Dracula
overview: Liam's village is threatened by a massive horde of vampires led by a Dracula.

title: Liam Tries Becoming King of the Promised Land
overview: Those under the Dracula's rule have been saved. Liam is now king, recognized by both the people and the surrounding countries.

title: Liam Tries Talking to a Girl
overview: Lady Flora's visit is interrupted by an exploding monster.

title: Liam Tries Creating and Playing in an Ocean
overview: Liam finds a way for his citizens to procure their own water and salt.

title: Liam Tries Building a Magic City
overview: Liam stays in his kingdom while Jamil watches him to ensure he doesn't interfere with the drought, so Jamil gets an idea.

title: The Kingdom of Liam Radon
overview: The dragon knights of Quistador request an audience with Liam.
